escalation.rationale: Multiple high-casualty strikes including Pakistan airstrikes on Kabul hospital killing 400 and escalating Iranian missile attacks on Israel killing 2.

ticker_items: Pakistan airstrikes kill 400 at Kabul hospital
Iranian missiles hit central Israel, 2 dead
Israel begins ground offensive in Lebanon
Iran hits UAE gas field, closes Hormuz Strait
US embassy Baghdad hit by rockets, drones

new_entrant.text: Pakistan has escalated involvement through deadly airstrikes on Afghanistan territory targeting Kabul hospital.

middle_east.description: Iranian missile attack on central Israel kills 2 people and damages Tel Aviv train station.
Israeli airstrike flattens residential building in central Beirut, killing 6.
Iranian attack sets massive natural gas field ablaze in UAE.
Pakistani airstrikes hit hospital in Kabul, Afghanistan claims 400 killed.
Rockets and drones target US embassy in Baghdad in most intense attack since Iran war began.

middle_east.text: Iran will continue to resist attack by the US armed forces until US President Donald Trump realizes that the conflict he initiated was a mistake and must never be repeated
middle_east.speaker: Abbas Araghchi
middle_east.title: Iranian Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: Will hit enemy where it least expects
middle_east.speaker: Rear Admiral Shahram Irani
middle_east.title: Iranian Navy Commander

observers.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz ruled out military participation in Strait of Hormuz mission, emphasizing NATO is a defense alliance not intervention alliance.
UK agreeing new defense partnership with Ukraine to boost drone production and global defensive capability. PM Starmer meeting Zelensky in London.
US Treasury Secretary rejected reports that Trump threatened to delay China visit over Hormuz Strait assistance request.

financial.notes: Oil prices impacted by Iran's effective closure of Strait of Hormuz carrying one-fifth of global oil supplies.

update_log.text: Pakistan conducted deadly airstrikes on Kabul hospital, Afghanistan claims 400 killed
Iranian missiles hit central Israel's Ramat Gan area killing 2 people
Israel launches ground offensive in Lebanon as airstrikes hit central Beirut
Iran sets UAE gas field ablaze in escalating energy infrastructure attacks
Most intense rocket and drone attack on US embassy Baghdad since Iran war began
